rewritten_requirements: The system shall allow a user to create a new account.
The system shall validate the registration of a new user.
The system shall allow the user to log in upon successful registration.
The system shall provide options for logged-in users to check their ticket status.
The system shall allow a user to book a ticket, which will be confirmed.
The system shall enable users to manage their account details such as editing or deleting them.
The system shall log out the user after they complete any action.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system allows a user to create a new account.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: A person starts by either creating a new account or logging in if they already have one.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system validates the registration of a new user.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If they are new, they go through registration. If the registration is not valid, it ends there.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Upon successful registration, the system allows the user to log in.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If it is successful, they continue to log in.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system provides options for logged-in users to check their ticket status.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After logging in, the person can choose what they want to do. They can check the status of their tickets and then finish.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system allows a user to book a ticket after which it is confirmed.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: They can book a ticket, after which the ticket is confirmed, and then they make the payment.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system enables users to manage their account details such as editing or deleting them.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: They can also choose to manage their account, such as editing or deleting their details.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system logs out the user after they complete any action.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After completing any of these actions, the person logs out, and it ends.
